source: chat: user-approved feedback loop decisions through 2026-05-09
summary: Accepted KB refactor decisions for CodeWiki product/system boundaries, flat system docs, builds-as-briefs, gated agency, and visual-UI-only product UI scope.

accepted_decisions.summary: CodeWiki knowledge bases should use product/overview.md, product/users/**, product/stories/**, product/uis/**, system/overview.md, system/architecture.mmd, system/file-structure.md, and one flat system component doc per architecture component.
Product UI means visual user interfaces only; tools, commands, skills, CLI, MCP, package APIs, and harness adapters are access surfaces documented in system API/adapters/extension docs.

CodeWiki system docs should be flat for this project: api.md, extension.md, adapters.md, agency.md, compilers.md, validation-gateway.md, builds.md, graph.md, knowledge.md, roadmap.md, plus overview/file-structure/architecture.mmd.
Builds are temporary loop briefs: feedback_build for validated intent, documentation_build for implementation specs, implementation_build for implementation evidence and publication support.
Roadmap owns work truth only: queue, priority, status, blockers, progress, closure, and links to builds/knowledge; it does not duplicate requirements briefs.
Graph owns generated state-machine truth for drift, freshness, routing, and next-loop selection; it is rebuilt from canonical inputs and not hand-edited.
Gated agency is the product capability; heartbeat is the system implementation mechanism for bounded roadmap automation through token, time, risk, validation, policy, and approval gates.
Validation gateway owns loop-exit, closure, release, and publication readiness decisions; passing validation may be captured in accepted builds while fail/block/policy reports persist.

assumptions: No code implementation changes are part of this documentation pass.
Generated graph/roadmap tools are not refreshed in this pass to keep the current change scoped to KB/build/validation artifacts.
open_questions: Whether pass validation reports should be persisted by default remains policy-dependent; current docs keep pass reports optional unless release/audit/publication policy requires persistence.
non_goals: Implement CLI, MCP, Claude Code, Codex, or other future adapters now.
Refactor runtime TypeScript code in this pass.
Regenerate roadmap tasks or graph state in this pass.
